Your Vision Begins Here

Blindsight, the Ethereum-based memecoin paying tribute to Neuralink’s cool idea of restoring sight. We’re not claiming to fix the world’s problems, but we are here to shake things up in the memecoin space. Open your eyes to a life of prosperity.
